steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: NASA crashed a probe into Dimorphos, and the next sentence describes what happened as a result: the orbital period changed. The blank needs a word that signals this consequence or result.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content: Consequently signals the result of the crash on Dimorphos's orbital period. The other choices add separate facts, narrow details, or suggest comparison—none of which express causality. That matches choice C — C is correct.
